parameters.jsCode:
const j = $input.first().json;
const summary = [
  '=== CREATE DEPLOYMENT: ' + j.appName + ' (createDeployment) ===',
  j.createDeployResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== CREATE SERVICE: ' + j.appName + ' (createService) ===',
  j.createSvcResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== CREATE HPA: ' + j.appName + ' (createHpa 1-5 replicas, cpu>70%) ===',
  j.createHpaResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== CREATE NETWORK POLICY: Ingress allow (createNetworkPolicy) ===',
  j.createNetpolResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== MONITOR DEPLOYMENTS in ' + j.testNamespace + ' (monitorDeployments) ===',
  j.monitorResult || 'N/A'
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...j, aggregatedOutput: summary, aiPrompt: 'Analyze these OpenShift resource provisioning results. Provide: 1) HTML table showing each resource created (Deployment, Service, HPA, NetworkPolicy) with status, 2) Deployment readiness assessment, 3) Next steps for production readiness. Red Hat style.' } }];
